goal: Determine whether the 12 rule 100002 alerts surrounding the focal shell spawn are sshd false positives or a genuine stdio-redirect attack from another process.
what_to_characterize: process name (proc.name) responsible for the stdio redirect in each 100002 alert
source and destination IPs and ports (which direction is the connection)
whether the process is sshd or something else
whether there is a pattern (same process, same IPs across all 12 events)
what the full output/rule text says about the connection
